title: Food Chain
tagline: 3D-printed food chain pendant sketched in VR — organic forms from digital tools
description: A 3D-printed food chain of interlocking animals, sketched in VR using Adobe Medium and printed in high resolution on a Prusa printer.
what: Designed in VR using Adobe Medium — sketching interlocking animal and plant forms in 3D space — then exported as OBJ and prepared in Prusa slicer. After multiple failed prints at lower resolutions, succeeded at 0.05mm (9 hours overnight). Support removal required carefully heating a scalpel and using tiny pliers. Second iteration redrawn from scratch with 2D animal outlines extruded in 3D for less support material.
why: Exploring what happens when digital tools are used to create objects that feel organic and hand-made. 3D printers excel at interlocking forms, so a food chain — where each link must pass through the next — became the design challenge.
